title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese presents four practical Claude Code projects for builders: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an Internal Operating System. The video emphasizes hands-on building over passive tutorial consumption.
